name: KrillApp.DataPoint.Filter.DiscardBelow
title: Discard Below
description: Rejects DataPoint snapshots where the value falls below a configured minimum threshold. When a snapshot value is less than the threshold, it is discarded and not stored. Prevents outliers, sensor errors, or invalid low readings from entering the data store.
shortDescription: Discards snapshots with values below a configured minimum threshold.
llmPurpose: Rejects incoming DataPoint snapshots where the value falls below a configured minimum threshold.
llmBehavior: discards snapshot if condition is true
llmTypicalUseCases: filter out zero or below-zero values
llmCreationHints: Create a DiscardBelow filter when the user wants to reject values below a minimum. Requires a numeric threshold value.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf filter node that gates incoming snapshot values
